for k,v in sorted(d.get('timestamps',{}).items()):

" 2>/dev/null || echo "NO_HEARTBEAT_STATE"

cat /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/heartbeat-state.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "

d=json.load(sys.stdin)
last = d.get('timestamps',{})

" 2>/dev/null || head -5 /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/heartbeat-state.json 2>/dev/null || echo "NO_STATE"

All heartbeat checks complete. Here's the summary:

**✅ All Checks Pass — 2026-07-16 13:20 AEST**

| Check | Status |
|---|---|
| **Main Session Context** | ✅ OK — 24% of 262K limit (63K tokens, ~85 messages) |
| **Main Session Resume** | ✅ All registered sessions alive |
| **Session Model Drift** | ✅ On primary (kimi-k2.7-code:cloud) |
| **Task Watchdog** | ✅ 8/8 healthy, no stalls |
| **Cron Health** | ✅ Clean, no retryable failures |
| **Cron Dead Letter** | ✅ No unacknowledged entries |
| **OWL Compliance** | ✅ 100% (0 atoms verified, 0 drifts) |
| **Delegated Auth** | ✅ All valid |
| **Aria CREST Compliance** | ✅ COMPLIANT, 0 violations |
| **Budget — Ollama Requests** | ✅ 33.9% used (28,567/84,268), 386 req/hr burn, projected exhausion 22 Jul |
| **Budget — USD (Anthropic)** | 🟡 Parked per CHG-0502 |
| **Agent Health** | ✅ Gateway OK, Ollama OK, disk OK |
| **DoD Validation** | ✅ No alerts |
| **Task Verification** | ✅ Acknowledged, no action needed |
| **Standby Mode** | ⬜ Inactive (cleared 9 Jul) |
| **System Banner** | ⬜ None active |
| **CHG Triggers** | 🟢 All active triggers normal; TRIGGER-03 (Gemma4 OC2) fired & validated 14 Jul; OC2A live single-node PROD per CHG-1783 |

**Notable:**
- OC2A is live as single-node PROD (Mac16,11, 48GB RAM, Tailscale). HA pair deferred.
- TRIGGER-01 (OC2 Arrival) still has multiple open sub-actions: Claude key restoration, PG migration, tech workspace, cloud outage probe, fresh install plan.
- Ollama request budget at 33.9% — projected to last through to 22 Jul (2 days past window end), healthy burn.
- Next expected ceremony gate: None this week (not Monday).
